title: astilbe astilboides
intro: Astilbe astilboides, also known as False Goat's Beard, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the Saxifragaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Astilbe astilboides include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
